    A

    adaptJson(Class) - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets an IuJsonAdapter for a class.
    adaptJson(Type) - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets an IuJsonAdapter for a generic type.
    addClientAuth(HttpRequest.Builder, Map) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Adds client authentication to pending token endpoint POST params.
    AuthorizationGrant - Class in iu.oidc.client
    Authenticates using authorization_code, then refresh_token to renew after the original response expires.
    AuthorizationGrant(IuOidcClientReference, String) - Constructor for class iu.oidc.client.AuthorizationGrant
    Constructor.
    authorize(IuRequestAttributes, String, String) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcAuthorization
     

    C

    ClientCredentialsGrant - Class in iu.oidc.client
    Authenticates to an OAuth 2.0 Token endpoint, verifies and holds a JWT access token until expired.

    Constructor.
    config - Variable in class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Client configuration reference.

    Creates a client or bearer assertion.

    G

    getAccessToken(URI) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcPrincipal
     
    getApiResources() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets root resource URIs for downstream APIs.
    getAssertionJwk() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets WebKey to use for signing assertions issued on behalf of this client.
    getAssertionTtl() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the length of time to issue client assertions for.
    getAuthorizedPrincipal(IuRequestAttributes) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcAuthorization
     
    getClaim(String, Class) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcPrincipal
     
    getClient() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets OIDC client configuration.
    getClientId() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the client ID.
    getClientSecret() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the client secret.
    getDecryptJwk() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the available keys for decrypting tokens for this client.
    getIdToken() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcPrincipal
     
    getIdToken() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Gets the verified ID token.
    getIssuer() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcProvider
    Gets the issuer URI.
    getMaxAge() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the maximum length of time to allow since user authentication.
    getMetadata() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcProvider
    Gets configured metadata.
    getMetadata(IuOidcProvider) - Static method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcProviders
    Gets OIDC provider metadata.
    getMetadataTtl() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcProvider
    Gets the metadata refresh interval.
    getMetadataUri() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcProvider
    Gets the metadata configuration URI.
    getName() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcPrincipal
     
    getNonce() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.OidcPreAuthSession
    Gets the nonce parameter value.
    getNotAfter() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.OidcPostAuthSession
    Gets the point in time token expiration date, from expires_in;
    getNotAfter() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Gets the point in time the current response expires.
    getPassword() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the resource owner password.
    getProvider() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets OIDC provider configuration.
    getRedirectUri() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets the redirect URI for handling authorization code return requests.
    getResourceUri() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the resource URI.
    getResourceUri() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets the resource URI.
    getScope() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Gets the scope parameter value to send to the token endpoint.
    getSessionHandler() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClientReference
    Provides the session handler for passing state between authorization code redirects.
    getSetCookie() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcPrincipal
     
    getState() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.OidcPreAuthSession
    Gets the state parameter value.
    getTokenResponse() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.OidcPostAuthSession
    Gets the token response.
    getTokenResponse() - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Gets the most recently verified token response.
    getTokenTtl() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the maximum length of time to allow an ID token issued to this client to be valid.
    getUsername() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Gets the resource owner username.

    I

    init(String, String) - Method in class iu.oidc.client.OidcAuthorization
     
    isUseBasicAuth() - Method in interface iu.oidc.client.config.IuOidcClient
    Determines if client secret should sent via the Authorization Basic header.
    iu.oidc.client - package iu.oidc.client
     
    iu.oidc.client.config - package iu.oidc.client.config
     
    iu.util.oidc.client - module iu.util.oidc.client
    IU OIDC client utilities module.
    IuOidcClient - Interface in iu.oidc.client.config
    Client view of an OIDC registration.
    IuOidcClientReference - Interface in iu.oidc.client.config
    Provides client application resources to OIDC components.
    IuOidcProvider - Interface in iu.oidc.client.config
    Client view of an OIDC provider.

    Authenticates to an OAuth 2.0 Token endpoint, verifies and holds a JWT access token until expired.

    OidcPostAuthSession - Interface in iu.oidc.client
    Holds tokens after successful OIDC authorization
    OidcPreAuthSession - Interface in iu.oidc.client
    Holds authorization attributes.

    Constructor.
    OidcProviders - Class in iu.oidc.client
    Loads IuOidcProviderMetadata instances.
    OidcTokenGrant - Class in iu.oidc.client
    Authenticates to a token endpoint, verifies and holds token response until expired.

    Constructor.
    OidcTokenGrant(IuOidcClientReference, IuOidcTokenResponse, Instant) - Constructor for class iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
    Constructor.
    OnBehalfOfGrant - Class in iu.oidc.client
    Authenticates to an OAuth 2.0 Token endpoint, verifies and holds a JWT access token until expired.
